marathon.name: Bull
marathon.bio: Hey there, I'm Bull! I'm a handsome guy that is here hoping that my new family finds me soon. I'm very active, playful and ready to go have some FUN! I'd be a great fit in a home with other dogs and may do well with cats too - I'm not quite sure what those are yet! I love to play and zoom around so if you want a fun dog this summer - then lets go! I'll jump in your car right now!

marathon.name: Verdi
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Verdi! I'm a fun loving lady that is here at HSMC looking for a new place to call home, and let me tell you - I'm a little picky! I'm a diva, and I'm not afraid to say it. I'm not a big fan of being picked up or held, but will curl up in your lap on my own terms - I just like to be in charge. I love to be spoiled and would be best as an only pet. If you think I could be the diva of my dreams then come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Snowy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Snowy! I'm ready to hop into your life! I'm a sweet girl that is ready to start anew in a new home! I'm a friendly bun that would love a family that has lots of time to spend with me. I enjoy spending time being pet and would make an excellent pet for any home! Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Honey
marathon.bio: I heard ya'll were looking to grow your family by four paws and I'm hoping to be the lucky dog you choose. I'm a high energy girlie who is playful, curious and downright adorable. I'm social with other dogs but will need my food, treats and high value items kept separate. I'm looking for an active lifestyle with adventure around every corner and in return I'll love you like no dog ever has. Wanna shake on it?

marathon.name: Valestin
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Valestin! I'm a handsome guy that wandered his way into HSMC after going on an adventure. I've decided it's time to settle down and find a family to call my own, so please adopt me! I'm playful, outgoing and ready to be yours! Let's adventure together!

marathon.name: Paddy
marathon.bio: Hi there, I'm Paddy! I'm a handsome guy that is here at HSMC looking for a new family to call my own. I'm quite the funny guy, always getting into some sort of trouble and making the staff laugh. I love to be around people and would love a family that has lots of time for me. Come visit me soon!

marathon.name: Walter
marathon.bio: Hey! I’m Walter! I’ve been with Fetch for awhile now, and I’m STILL looking for my forever family. Let me reintroduce myself: I’m a happy boy who likes to be a part of what’s going on. Whether we’re making dinner, you’re showering, or doing laundry - doesn’t matter to me as long as we’re together. I can supervise any project you got goin on! I am always excited to show you what I have. I am kennel/crate trained and I know to do my business outside! I’m strong, like you can tell I work out and all that. I know how to walk nicely on a leash but sometimes I seriously forget it’s even attached, this nose of mine is soooo powerful it’s crazy. I am special, my foster mom says it all the time. Just to make sure I get enough love and attention, it would be best if I am the only “good boy” in my forever home. I run like a graceful rhino and my white hair is so silky soft you won’t be able to resist loving on me. I have gotten myself into a couple situations and I really want to leave my troubled past behind me and move forward with people who get me. People who know tell me that I need structure and leadership: if you let me be the pack leader, I will take advantage of that situation. I love training and learning, my foster mom is kick butt cool at it, she has lots more information for you since I am sooo special, so apply and let’s get this party started! Apply here: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt Name: Walter Sex: Male Breed: Pitbull/Basset Hound mix Age: 4 years Weight:

marathon.name: Frank fka Finch
marathon.bio: Hi, I’m Frank — and playing is my game! I absolutely love everyone I meet, whether they have two legs or four. Animals, humans… if you exist, I’m probably excited to be your friend! I live with a young pup and we play all day, every day. There’s also an older gentleman in the house who prefers his space—I respect that—and a middle-aged lady who plays with me sometimes. I’m really good at reading her cues, if I do say so myself. I don’t want to brag, but I do great in a kennel. I’ll sleep in there at night if you insist… but cuddling with you would be my top choice. Cuddles are one of my favorite things (second only to playtime, of course). I have pretty good recall, though I can be a bit dopey at times and could use some continued practice. My foster mom has an underground fence, and I’ve done an excellent job respecting it—I’ve never crossed the line! I greet strangers with open paws and a big heart. I especially love having kiddos around to play with and snuggle. One thing I’m still working on is leash walking. I just get so excited when I see new people and dogs that my enthusiasm sometimes takes over—but with a little training and patience, I know I’ll get there. If you’re looking for a loving, playful, happy-go-lucky companion who’s full of affection and joy, I might just be your guy. **Side note: Frank has been to the vet regarding his cherry eyes. At this time, the vet doesn’t recommend another surgery to fix them. You can apply for Frank at: https://www.fetchfosterand

marathon.name: Zoey
marathon.bio: COURTESY POST This dog is not in our Rescue, but Fetch is assisting with the screening of applicants. Zoey, here! I'm a 50-60 lb Lab mix who is in search of a new home due to no fault of my own. I've been told I'm quite the smarty pants, knowing my recall and basic commands. Heck, I'm even quite affectionate cause what girl doesn't love a little snugglin'? I've hung out with other pups my size and smaller and honestly, I didn't mind them. I've also been good with the cats and little humans I've met too. I guess you could say I'm easy going. My vaccines are all up to date and I'm spayed. Now, the only thing I'm missing is a place to call my forever home. Could that be with you? If so, contact Fetch and apply for me. Then my temporary family can be in touch real soon and we can start our forever together! Zoey You can apply for me at: https://www.fetchfosterandrescue.com/adopt Name: Zoey Age: 4 years Breed: Lab mix Sex: Female Weight: 50-60 lbs. Altered: Yes Good with kids: Yes, I've been good with the kids I've met. Good with dogs: Yes, I enjoy dog friends Good with cats: Yes, I don't mind cats. Fetch Foster and Rescue Inc is a 501c3 non-profit organization ##2673788##Less

marathon.name: Fortune
marathon.bio: Hey Ladies… Fortune Here (But my friends just call me Handsome)Breed: Karakachan MixDOB: 9/24/21Weight: 69 lbs of floofy perfectionAdoption Fee: $400 solo, or $600 if you take me and my sister Cookie (total steal, honestly) Apply to adopt us here!Yo. I’m Fortune — tall, floofy, and truly one of a kind. People used to call me shy, but after a whole year in my foster home, I’ve learned that life is actually pretty awesome when you’ve got good snacks, kind humans, and a comfy spot to nap.These days, I’m showing my true colors: gentle, loyal, and just a little goofy. I still have a calm, thoughtful side — the kind of dog who watches the world go by before jumping in — but once I trust you, I’ll be your biggest fan. My favorite things? Quiet moments, soft pets, car rides with the windows down, and (don’t tell Cookie) … Cheetos. I’ll do just about anything for a Cheeto. Fun Facts About Me:• I’ve been in foster care for over a year, and wow, have I come a long way! I’m more confident every day and really starting to shine.• I’m all about those long walks, chill car rides, and lazy afternoons with my humans.• I currently live with my sister Cookie — we’re a great team. We wrestle, nap, and make each other laugh.• You don’t have to adopt us both, but come on… double the love, double the floof. What I’m Looking For:• A kind, patient person who’ll keep helping me blossom at my own pace.• A home with older kids (14+ is best) since I’m a big guy with big zoomies.• Someone who sees past th

clark.name: Harvey
clark.bio: Meet Harvey! Harvey came to CCHS from a local farm earlier this August. This handsome Heeler mix is just about a year old and weighs roughly 41.6lbs currently. Harvey is a shining pup with a smile to match! He is as sweet as can be, though he can start out a little timid at times. Harvey is a smart guy, just waiting to figure out all of life's puzzles and snufflemats! He would benefit from an active furever home that can help burn some of that remaining puppy energy! Harvey gets a little nervous around small children and would much prefer a home with older children that know how to respect his space. While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% your newest front seat co-pilot! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Harvey today!

clark.name: Willow
clark.bio: Meet Willow! Willow came to CCHS as a stray from the Loyal area towards the beginning of August. This sweet gal is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 48.3lbs currently. Willow is an absolute sweetheart! She can be a little on the timid side, as coming into a shelter setting can be quite daunting to some pups, but with a few treats, positive encouragement, and a whole lotta forehead kissies and she will warm up in no time! Willow is currently working on her leash manners as she can tend to get a little excitable when she catches a new scent! She would benefit from having a patient furever family that is willing to meet her where she is at with all of her little quirks! Willow would also benefit from being the only dog in her furever home as she can have a bit of anxiety around other dogs. While we may not be entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she's 100% a good girl! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Willow today!

clark.name: Cleo
clark.bio: Meet Cleo! Cleo came to CCHS as a stray towards the beginning of September from the Neillsville area, before being adopted out for a short time and brought back for, well, being a dog! This happy Husky is about 5 1/2 years old and weighs roughly 58.8lbs currently. Cleo is the biggest cuddle buddy you could ask for! She loves to be by your side through any adventure you may have to endure! Her only fault is that she sheds a little too much, but what husky doesn't! Cleo is quite the communicator! In typical Husky fashion, she is not afraid to voice her thoughts and feelings! While she knows how to get along with other dogs, she's a little picky when it comes to who she considers a bestie. Cleo would make an excellent addition to just about any family but would most likely do better with older kids. With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Cleo today!

clark.name: Herman
clark.bio: Meet Herman! Herman came to CCHS when he was found as a stray near County Hwy H, Neillsville. Herman is a mixed breed, and we can't say for sure what his breed mix is. We can say for sure that he is one big handsome dog! He is about 2 years old and weighs 73.2#. He has a good-looking short-haired black and white coat. Herman is an energetic guy who loves to get out in our big Pen 180 to run around. He has a big ole bark, but that's just to let you know he wants attention. Herman will probably do best as the only pet in his new home where he'd like to be treated as a king! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Herman today!

clark.name: Bart
clark.bio: Meet Bart! Bart came to CCHS with his 7 siblings towards the very end of December from a local farm. This lively Heeler mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 10.5lbs currently. Bart is such a goofball! He can be a little awkward in his approach but he's hoping his adorable looks can distract you from that! While we aren't entirely certain what hos exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Silly Goose! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success to the pup. Apply for Bart today!

clark.name: Darla
clark.bio: Meet Darla! Darla came to CCHS as a stray from the township of Fremont earlier this January. This pretty Red Heeler is about a year and a half old and weighs roughly 35.2lbs currently. Darla is an absolute ray of awkward sunshine! She is such a smart gal but didn't quite grasp onto the social skills so she hopes you can look past her being a bit forward with her affection! Darla is a tad protective of her food, so she'd prefer being the only dog in the home to avoid her anxiety around sharing. With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Darla today!

clark.name: Tia
clark.bio: Meet Tia! Tia came to CCHS with her sister Tamara as strays from the Loyal area earlier this February. This sweet gal is about 9 weeks old and weighs roughly 8.2lbs currently. Tia is a little lovebug! She cannot get enough of being doted on and will always try to sneak kisses in whenever she can! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% The American Standard! With any pup, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Tia today!

clark.name: Tamara
clark.bio: Meet Tamara! Tamara came to CCHS with her sister Tia as strays from the Loyal area earlier this February. This darling gal is about 9 weeks old and weighs roughly 9.4lbs currently. Tamara is a little bit of a bashful gal! She isn't always certain that she wants to make new friends, but she always ends up loving anyone who shows her attention anyhow! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Cutie-Patootie! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Tamara today!

clark.name: Willie
clark.bio: Meet Willie! Willie came to CCHS with his mom and 3 brothers towards the very end of February from a local farm. This dapper Terrier mix is about 11 weeks old and weighs roughly 7.2lbs currently. Willie is a true snugglebug! He would love nothing more than to stay curled up on a lap and snooze the day away! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Your Country Boy! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Willie today!

clark.name: Hank
clark.bio: Meet Hank! Hank came to CCHS with his mom and 3 brothers towards the very end of February from a local farm. This dashing Terrier mix is about 11 weeks old and weighs roughly 6.9lbs currently. Hank is a handsome little guy with a whole lotta fire and love in his heart that he is just itching to spread! He loves to snuggle but he can often get distracted by his own shenanigans, so having a lap to stay on helps keep this cutie outta trouble! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Born to Boogie! With any puppy, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Hank today!

clark.name: Daisy Mae
clark.bio: Meet Daisy Mae! Daisy Mae came to CCHS as a stray found in the Withee area towards the very end of February. This sassy Chihuahua mix is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 13.8lbs currently. Daisy Mae is a small but mighty personality with a bit of a princess air to her! We don't have much information into her past, but from what we've seen here, she is ready to be in charge of her own furever home! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Head Boss in Charge! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Daisy Mae today!

clark.name: Patty
clark.bio: Meet Patty! Patty came to CCHS with her 4 kittens towards the beginning of March as strays from the Greenwood area. This quirky Tabby is about a year old and weighs roughly 7lbs currently. Patty is a bit of an odd gal! She always looks so surprised with her big eyes! If you're looking for a cat that will have you second guessing your every move with a side eye, Patty is the one for you! Her interesting aura will draw you in and have you both in awe and mild confusion as to how you ended up with such a goofy cat! Apply for Patty today!

clark.name: Oscar
clark.bio: Meet Oscar! Oscar came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner had unfortunately passed. This handsome mixed breed is about 2 years old and weighs roughly 61lbs currently. Oscar is s total goofball! He admittedly will do just about anything to be told he's a good boy! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% North American House Hippo! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Oscar today!

clark.name: Duke
clark.bio: Meet Duke! Duke came to CCHS as an owner surrender towards the beginning of this March after some unexpected life changes occurred. This handsome Weimaraner is about 4 years old and weighs roughly 112lbs currently. Duke is a proper gentleman! He loves to be active and would benefit from a furever family that shares that love for the outdoors! Don't worry though, he always takes the time to make sure everyone stays accounted for! With any rescue, training and socialization is incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Duke today!

clark.name: Bailey
clark.bio: Meet Bailey! Bailey came to CCHS as an owner surrender when a sudden life change occurred and the owner was left with too many dogs. This handsome mixed breed was originally adopted out at just a few months old and now is standing tall at 1 year and 8 months old, weighing roughly 46.4lbs currently. Bailey is a bit of a goofball! He's been known to get along well with dogs, kids, and cats, enticing them into friendship with his silly shenanigans! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Town Jester! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Bailey today!

clark.name: Mabel
clark.bio: Meet Mabel! Mabel first came to CCHS with her 5 siblings towards the beginning of October last year from a local farm. She ended up being adopted out to a family with small children and unfortunately developed some anxiety around those small children and because of that, ended up back with us. This sweet Heeler mix is now 7 months old and weighs roughly 35.8lbs currently. Mabel is a bit of a bashful gal! She loves people and loves to love on them, but it can often take her a minute or two to get comfortable with new faces. Mabel would benefit from a home that can give her the patience and grace she needs to get adjusted, because once she is, her sparkling personality will blossom larger than life! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Mabel today!

clark.name: Thor
clark.bio: Meet Thor! Thor came to CCHS as an owner surrender after his owner had to take on caring for their family member. This handsome Red Heeler mix is about 1 year old and weighs roughly 28.5lbs currently. Thor is a total loverboy! He has a friendly demeanor and is down for any adventure! Thor would benefit from an active family that can help burn off some of that energy he has! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the dog. Apply for Thor today!

clark.name: Kayce
clark.bio: Meet Kayce! Kayce came to CCHS as an owner surrender after schedule changes left not enough time to spend with him. This handsome Husky/Lab mix is just over a year old and weighs roughly 71.5lbs currently. Kayce is a hardworking, loyal pup that just wants a person of his own to stick to the side of! He doesn't quite fully grasp that animals smaller than him don't like being in his mouth, so he would do better in a home with no cats or smaller livestock. We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% Handsome Man! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Kayce today!

clark.name: Clover
clark.bio: Meet Clover! Clover came to CCHS with her brother Lucky towards the beginning of March from a local farm. This beautiful Black Lab Mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 30.4lbs currently. Clover has such a bright personality! She loves to be where the people are and will try to climb in any lap that will let her sit! While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Wiggling Snugglebug! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Clover today!

clark.name: Lucky
clark.bio: Meet Lucky! Lucky came to CCHS with his sister Clover towards the beginning of March from a local farm. This bashful Black Lab mix is about 16 weeks old and weighs roughly 23.0lbs currently. Lucky is a little bit of a shy guy! He isn't entirely certain what to make of people, or other dogs, or anything really, but he is determined to investigate everything as thoroughly as possible! While we aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, we can tell you he is 100% Sherlock Holmes Understudy! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Lucky today!

clark.name: Percy
clark.bio: Meet Percy! Percy came to CCHS as a stray from the Longwood area towards the beginning of March. This sweet Hound mix is about 6 months old and weighs roughly 50.5lbs currently. Percy is a total ham! He has a goofy personality and a love for giving kisses! We aren't entirely certain what his exact breed makeup is, but we can tell you he is 100% Happy to be Involved! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Percy today!

clark.name: Sally
clark.bio: Meet Sally! Sally came to CCHS as an owner surrender when a sudden life change occurred and the owner was left with too many dogs. This bashful Aussie mix was originally adopted out at just a few months old and is now about 1 year and 5 months old and weighs roughly 27.7lbs. Sally is a little bit of a shy gal! She knows how to get along with anyone and everyone, but she does need to check her syllabus over twice before she'll lose the side eye. While we aren't entirely certain what her exact breed makeup is, we can tell you she is 100% Skeptical Burnt Croissant! With any rescue, training and socialization are incredibly important to the success of the pup. Apply for Sally today!

adams.name: Brownie
adams.bio: Awaiting spay/neuter. Will be available for adoption 4/9/2026

adams.name: Brie
adams.bio: Awaiting spay/neuter. Will be available for adoption 4/9/2026

adams.name: Hennessey
adams.bio: Meet Hennessey! She's 1 year old and shy at first meet, but she's secretly a world-class snuggler. Give her a little time to warm up and she’ll reward you by melting into your arms like she was made to be held. Her favorite hobby? Curling up against your chest, nuzzling under your chin, and purring until she forgets all her worries. Did we mention she drools when she’s extra happy? That’s not a flaw. That’s premium, top-shelf affection. So today, we’re telling Hennessey: You are beautiful. You are uniquely you. You are snuggly perfection. Now all she needs is a human to tell her that every day.Less

adams.name: Ada
adams.bio: Ada has been growing up in the shelter. While other kittens were snuggling on couches, chasing their own tails, and murdering pesky stray socks, Ada has been patiently waiting for her forever home. She’s a shy girl who takes her time deciding you’re one of the good ones, but once you are, it’s the sweetest honor. Ada will need a patient adopter who understands that the best companions just need the opportunity to thrive. She also needs to be in a home with other cats. Feline friends help her feel safe and show her the ropes. A confident kitty companion could make all the difference in helping Ada blossom. Growing up in a shelter isn’t what we want for her. Ada deserves someone who believes she’s worth the wait. If you have a calm home, a kind heart, and a kitty looking for a friend, Ada just might be your girl.Less

adams.name: Torve
adams.bio: Torve and Crowe are looking for a patient, loving home. About Torve: This torbie (tortoiseshell/tabby) may be a little shy at first, but give her a moment (and a gentle hand) and she absolutely melts. Once she knows you’re a friend, Torve loves to be petted. And her fur? Truly some of the softest you’ll ever touch. Torve is a quiet sweetheart who would thrive in a calm, loving home where she can settle in at her own pace and be adored like the precious little sweetie pie she is. Note: She is bonded to Crowe and they must be adopted as a pair.Less

adams.name: Crowe
adams.bio: Crowe and Torve are looking for a patient, loving home. About Crowe: He can be a little shy at first and might even talk back while he’s figuring things out, but don’t be fooled! Once he feels safe, he really enjoys affection and gentle attention. He’s the kind of cat who comes out of his shell with kindness and turns into a sweet, loving companion. If you’re looking for a young cat with personality, a soft heart, and a quiet appreciation for cuddles, Crowe might be your perfect match. Note: He is bonded to Torve and they must be adopted as a pair.Less

adams.name: Midnight
adams.bio: Midnight is a 1-year-old tabby with movie-star looks and a velvety-soft coat you have to feel to believe. She’s playful, curious, and always ready to chase a toy like it’s her full-time job. This girl loves affection and will happily soak up attention, on her terms, of course. Midnight appreciates a slow introduction to other cats and a home that understands she sometimes needs her space. If she’s feeling overwhelmed or doesn’t want to be bothered, she may make a quick exit - but give her patience and kindness, and you’ll see just how incredibly sweet she truly is. She’s equal parts fun and tender, with a dash of diva charm. If you’re looking for a soft, playful companion who will keep you entertained and then curl up for love, Midnight might just be your perfect match.Less

lincoln.name: Mouse
lincoln.bio: Meet Mouse! She is a nice girl who can be shy at first but is a real sweetheart once she is comfortable! She is great with other cats and would be great in a calmer home!
